title: Prosoc Robot Navigation Task Card
description: Schema for a human-authored robot navigation task card. Task cards specify abstract robot intents that are composed with scenarios, contexts, and charter principles during evaluation.

id.description: Canonical, stable identifier for the task. Intended to be referenced by scenarios and evaluators.

summary.description: Brief abstract description of the task's intent, suitable for display or indexing.

primary_intent.description: Concise statement of what the robot is trying to accomplish when executing this task.

scope.description: Explicit definition of what this task includes and excludes.

includes.description: Behaviors or goals that are considered part of this task.

excludes.description: Behaviors, goals, or considerations that are explicitly not part of this task.

related_principles.description: Identifiers of Prosocial Navigation Charter principles typically implicated by this task.

common_failure_modes.description: Task-level failure modes that indicate poor execution independent of social context.

example_scenarios.description: Scenario identifiers that commonly involve this task. Provided for traceability and discoverability.
